mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.5%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth, compressing corporate margins and triggering a negative repricing of equity cash flows over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or threshold crossings show no predictive power for margin compression proxies.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth combined with rising housing starts signals robust aggregate demand outpacing supply constraints, driving earnings revisions upward and lifting equity returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Joint index of INDPRO and HOUST shows zero correlation with forward SPX returns over a 3-year rolling window, or interaction term coefficient is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising inflation environment, real yields increase as the Fed hikes rates, compressing equity multiples and depressing forward returns over the subsequent month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises > 0.2% MoM for 3 consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when CPI and FEDFUNDS both rise, or real yield spreads show no inverse relationship with equity valuations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding the long-term trend rate of 2.0% signals expanding corporate revenues, which mechanically supports positive equity returns over the following month as earnings estimates are revised upward.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDP growth vs forward SPX returns falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or earnings revisions show no correlation with GDP surprises.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid 3-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals deteriorating consumer demand, triggering risk-off positioning and negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative following unemployment spikes, or leading indicators like RSAFS do not confirm demand contraction.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances coupled with stable interest rates indicate sustainable household leverage supporting consumption, driving positive equity returns over a one-week horizon as retail earnings beat expectations.
failure_condition: Credit growth shows no predictive power for retail sector returns, or the interaction term becomes insignificant when controlling for inflation expectations.

mechanism_narrative: During supply chain normalization phases, sustained industrial production growth without corresponding inflation spikes signals improved profit margins, boosting equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL MoM change < 0.1% while INDPRO rises > 0.5% MoM
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when production rises without inflation, or margin proxies show no improvement during these periods.
